reviews.author: Suman Kumar Ghosh
reviews.title: Great lock with awesome built and features but not so great Installation service
reviews.body: First of all, I have no complaints about the lock itself—its build quality and features are excellent, and I believe it is one of the best available in the market. However, there was a mismatch between the installation requirements mentioned in the product manual and the actual installation process. The booklet states that installation is supported on doors with a thickness of 30 mm, but the technician informed me that a minimum thickness of 35 mm is required. Otherwise, the installation would either be declined or cancelled. The only alternative offered was to get a local carpenter to modify

reviews.author: priya
reviews.title: Lock is good but Amazon delivery worst and Amazon customer support pathetic
reviews.body: Amazon delivery is pathetic for 3 days u need to chase customer care executives and delivery guys and nobody is aware that where is the product. Delivery guy will update the wrong info that couldn't deliver due to bla bla reason , which is all crap only However lock is good but the wifi is getting disconnected frequently due to which u cannot see live view from door lock. They should exchange the wifi receiver inside the lock. Service from urban company is too good they were asking from the day when ordered, and came as soon as it delivered. Amazon need to improve their delivery and customer c

reviews.author: Shyama Srivatsa
reviews.title: Good smart door lock
reviews.body: It's a good door lock. Best option for anyone looking for smart door lock

reviews.author: Sanjeev Chakravarty
reviews.title: Excellent products and good services of Urban Company
reviews.body: Very Good product and service of Urban Company specially their Customer Care Executives Mr.Nikhil Kumar and Ms. Sudaksha Khungar. They had helped me a lot throughout the installation of the excellent UC Lock Ultra. I highly recommend UC PRODUCTS.

reviews.author: Anshul M.
reviews.title: Does what it says, no complaints
reviews.body: Bought last month. Face unlock works everytime, no issues. Setup was lil long but did it on weekend so no problem. Wife initially said price is too much but now she also likes it, specially the auto lock becoz we used to forget locking door at night sometimes. The video doorbell was not the main reason I bought it but its actually very gud. Can see who is outside and talk to them without opening door at all. App is easy to use also. gud UI. No complaints from my side. Build quality feels premium and it looks gud also. Would recommend.
